reviews.review_description:
It’s missing some major data that - as a user - I want to see.

So what’s it missing?

- data on how I’ve improved over time
- data on how I compare to others broken down to others my age, my gender and what the median standards are

Not knowing if I have good memory (or coordination etc) is a major flaw of this app. If it had these things in it I’d be willing to pay for the app. 

As it stands, since it was free I’m not going to leave a too harsh low star review. But I also won’t be using it moving forward because why would I? I don’t know if I’m good, improving, or have something I need to worry about. 

Hoping the devs take this on board.

developer_response.body:
Thank you Nikeetz for all of the feedback!
We are glad you enjoyed the game.
We reviewed the features you suggested and added them in the last update! Now all training data is available in the statistics section. Please check this.

Thanks again.

reviews.review_description: Ok so I’ve been thinking and I think you guys should have multiplayer minigames
So I got this game and there is no info on how to get a server sync code. Please fix this

developer_response.body:
Hello, Boredxpx! We updated the game and fixed this problem. Now you can register to get sync code at your email. After authorization your training progress, earned achievements and unlocked items will be saved in your profile. 
Also new mini-games, interactive objects and training statistics are available now.
Please update the game and check this=)
